News
Across Northeastern's global network, Khoury College's students, faculty, and staff are discovering, collaborating, and innovating, and their stories can be found here. Check Khoury News and Northeastern Global News for student and faculty achievements and stories, and Khoury in the Media for faculty perspectives on the day's news.

The solution to mental disorder misdiagnosis may lie in machine learning
By Juliana George
October 21, 2024
For bipolar and depressed patients, misdiagnoses are common and dangerous. Now, by combining blood biomarkers and machine learning, two Northeastern undergrads think they've found a way to tell the difference.
The dark side of AI chatbots: Khoury–CoE professor nets three honors for research on LLM risks
By Meghan Hirsch
October 17, 2024
As AI chatbots become more of a mainstay in day-to-day life, new research is raising questions about the many ways that users can manipulate them — and what happens when they do.
